mapper.select: select thread_id, user_id, summary, last_compacted_message_id, pending_historical_messages_json, recent_end_message_id, recent_window_size, active_draft_id, active_task_id, task_stage, active_skill_ids_json, updated_at from thread_memory_snapshots where user_id = #{userId} and thread_id = #{threadId}
mapper.insert: insert into thread_memory_snapshots (thread_id, user_id, summary, last_compacted_message_id, pending_historical_messages_json, recent_end_message_id, recent_window_size, active_draft_id, active_task_id, task_stage, active_skill_ids_json, updated_at) values (#{snapshot.threadId}, #{snapshot.userId}, #{snapshot.summary}, #{snapshot.lastCompactedMessageId}, CAST(#{snapshot.pendingHistoricalMessagesJson} AS jsonb), #{snapshot.recentEndMessageId}, #{snapshot.recentWindowSize}, #{snapshot.activeDraftId}, #{snapshot.activeTaskId}, #{snapshot.taskStage}, CAST(#{snapshot.activeSkillIdsJson} AS jsonb), #{snapshot.updatedAt}) on conflict (thread_id) do update set user_id = excluded.user_id, summary = excluded.summary, last_compacted_message_id = excluded.last_compacted_message_id, pending_historical_messages_json = excluded.pending_historical_messages_json, recent_end_message_id = excluded.recent_end_message_id, recent_window_size = excluded.recent_window_size, active_draft_id = excluded.active_draft_id, active_task_id = excluded.active_task_id, task_stage = excluded.task_stage, active_skill_ids_json = excluded.active_skill_ids_json, updated_at = excluded.updated_at
